commit_scope: Add a Form-native public rendezvous plus audio co-presence receipt floor with timing and pressure measurements.

commands: coord claim public-audio-rendezvous-floor "Add Form-native floor for public rendezvous carriers plus audio co-presence detection receipts and measurement/pressure rows; avoid live-cycle-emission runtime files, APK/JNI, BML compiler, and raw sensor lanes."
local_validation.notes: Focused Form validation returned 16383 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. fourth-arm-gate returned PASS-4WAY public-audio-rendezvous. The receipt floor separates public rendezvous carriers from audio co-presence, validates public API/paste/archive carrier classes, checks audio direction, requires raw-audio-retained=0, and records shape cells, recipe steps, tool/reasoning/oracle time, bottleneck, and pressure. No live microphone capture, public API POST, Pastebin write, or archive.org upload is claimed in this slice.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy requested; this is a Form-native receipt floor for future live public/audio carrier proofs.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The mesh carrier map now has a four-way receipt shape for public rendezvous plus audio co-presence and bottleneck measurement before live public-service or microphone carriers are claimed.
test_flows: Validate public rendezvous rows for public API, paste-style page, and archive-style page carrier classes.
Validate audio co-presence rows for audible/near-ultrasonic nonce detection with SNR, confidence, latency, and raw-audio-retained=0.
Validate measurement rows for shape cells, recipe steps, tool/reasoning/oracle time, bottleneck, and pressure.
Validate the composed session four-way through fkwu.

phase_gate.gate: Live public rendezvous and live audio detection must return this receipt shape before non-adb co-presence or public-service exchange is claimed.
phase_gate.next: Add a live public API rendezvous nonce proof or a live Mac/Android audio chirp detection receipt with no raw audio retention.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Mesh floors had loopback/native HTTP/adb-forward receipts and audio listed as buildable, but no combined public rendezvous plus audio co-presence measurement shape.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: public-audio-rendezvous returns 16383 four-way and names public carrier receipts, audio co-presence receipts, oracle-teacher allowance, and timing/pressure measurement rows.
